issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but effect text says 'place 4 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck' — should be 'SearchDeck' or similar deck-placement action, not trash removal

Filter specifies source as hand/trash, but effect retrieves from trash specifically — filter should target trash, not hand. Also, filter includes 'Character','Event','Stage' but only {Thriller Bark Pirates} type (subType) should match; cardTypes restriction may be overly broad
Missing count constraint: effect requires 'You may place 4' cards — action must include count validation (exactly 4 cards or up to 4)
Trigger is 'Activated' but should specify '[Activate: Main]' context if DSL supports activation phases — minor if DSL assumes Main phase for Activated
